Command: run
Scenario: example-scenario
Status: failed

Stages:
- sandbox_deploy/blocked: skip (layer enabled but implementation is deferred (real deployment skipped for cost reasons for now))

Failures:
- sandbox_deploy/blocked check=sandbox_deploy command="layer gate" detail="sandbox/live deploy layer is intentionally deferred due cost/credentials policy (real deployment skipped for cost reasons for now)"

Explainability:
- sandbox_deploy/blocked check=sandbox_deploy summary="sandbox deploy execution is intentionally blocked by governance policy" action="keep sandbox_deploy disabled until explicit cost and credentials approval is documented"
Usage:
  run <scenario> [flags]

Flags:
      --config string                (default "./infrafactory.yaml")
  -h, --help                        help for run
      --iterations-target int       
      --output string                (default "human")
      --repair-iterations-max int
